_comment: Historical TMF621-style trouble tickets. Used by NOC Manager to find similar incidents.

tickets.title: Fiber cut on north transport ring CABLE-NB-007
tickets.root_cause: construction excavator severed fiber on Banqiao section
tickets.resolution: fiber splicing on-site by tech team; rerouted traffic via LINK-N4-N1 during repair

tickets.title: Latency spike north transport ring
tickets.resolution: no action required; congestion resolved after drill ended

tickets.title: Suspicious egress traffic from CORE-POP1-EDGE
tickets.root_cause: compromised admin credential triggered outbound exfiltration attempt; matched IOC SIG-BOT-2098
tickets.resolution: credential rotated; affected node isolated; full audit performed

tickets.title: False positive fiber alarm due to SFP miscalibration
tickets.resolution: replaced SFP module on RTR-N1 port xe-0/1/2
